programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Romā ir notikusi dārglietu laupīšana, pēc kuras tiek nogalināti divi tās dalībnieki. Sekojot pa pēdām izmeklēšanas pavedieniem, atbildīgais komisārs Fabri dodas uz Vīni, kur iepazīstas ar pensionēto Reksi, un viņu starpā dzimst īsta draudzība. Tikmēr dārglietu laupītāju slepkavību izmeklēšana nes vairākus pārsteigumus, un pat tad, kad izmeklēšanai pielikts punkts, viss vēl nebūt nav beidzies.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Pēc tam, kad lieta par dārglietu laupītāju slepkavībām tiek atjaunota, Romā darba uzdevumā ierodas Ērika. Mūžīgās pilsētas iedvesmota, viņa ļaujas kādam romantiskam piedzīvojumam. Tajā pašā laikā izrādās, ka Lorenco priekšniekam nepatīk suņi, un Reksim var nākties sevi pierādīt, lai attaisnotu savu uzturēšanos policijas pārvaldē.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Romas ķīniešu kopienu satricina tās biedra nežēlīga slepkavība. Svešā kultūra un valoda izrādās nopietns šķērslis nozieguma atklāšanā, tāpēc Fabri un Reksim savā darbā ir jāķeras pie oriģinālām metodēm. Dažādu notikumu rezultātā Reksis nokļūst Itālijas preses izdevumu lappusēs.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Komisāram Reksim un viņa komandai nākas iedziļināties mākslas pasaules likumos un noslēpumos, lai atklātu slavena mākslas kritiķa slepkavību. Izmeklēšanas gaitā komandai nākas izmantot gan vismodernākās tehnoloģijas, gan aizliegtus paņēmienus. Pavisam nejauši atklājas satriecošs noslēpums saistībā ar Katju, kas varētu Katjas un Lorenco attiecības ievirzīt citā gultnē.

programme.title: Komisārs Reksis
programme.desc: Ne viss ir zelts Ir nogalināta jauna, skaista sieviete, kurai, pēc visām pazīmēm spriežot, bijis ļoti bagāts mīļākais. Viens noziegums ved pie nākamā, un kādā Romas vārtrūmē lode krūtīs tiek ietriekta kādam dzīvespriecīgam jaunietim ar aizdomīgiem hobijiem. Noziegumu pēdas ved uz Romas augstāko sabiedrību, un Lorenco izmeklēšanā nākas sastapties ar pretestību no policijas augstākās vadības. Reksis jokojoties apgūst triku, kas viņam negaidīti palīdzēs vainīgā aizturēšanā.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Seriāls "Policijas iecirknis 31" seko stāstam par detektīvseržanti Nadīnu Legrānu un viņas kolēģi Patriku Bisonē, kā arī citiem viņu biedriem policijas iecirknī, kur viņi sastopas ar ikdienas noziegumiem, kas notiek lielajās pilsētās: slepkavības, nolaupīšanas, ielaušanās, vardarbība ģimenē, narkotiku tirdzniecība, terorisms un daudz kas cits.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Robēns Menārs nozūd bez pēdām. Levasērs apgalvo, ka Menārs grib, lai Stefans tiktu nogalināts. Stefans lūdz Židitu un Olivjē būt uzmanīgiem. Drapo Stefanam atzīstas, kāpēc izmantojis viņa dēla fotogrāfiju. Izmeklētāji no Levasēra uzzina daudz noderīgas informācijas.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Seriāls "Policijas iecirknis 31" seko stāstam par detektīvseržanti Nadīnu Legrānu un viņas kolēģi Patriku Bisonē, kā arī citiem viņu biedriem policijas iecirknī, kur viņi sastopas ar ikdienas noziegumiem, kas notiek lielajās pilsētās: slepkavības, nolaupīšanas, ielaušanās, vardarbība ģimenē, narkotiku tirdzniecība, terorisms un daudz kas cits.

programme.title: Policijas iecirknis
programme.desc: Seriāls "Policijas iecirknis 31" seko stāstam par detektīvseržanti Nadīnu Legrānu un viņas kolēģi Patriku Bisonē, kā arī citiem viņu biedriem policijas iecirknī, kur viņi sastopas ar ikdienas noziegumiem, kas notiek lielajās pilsētās: slepkavības, nolaupīšanas, ielaušanās, vardarbība ģimenē, narkotiku tirdzniecība, terorisms un daudz kas cits.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Džims Hekers ar nepacietību gaida zvanu no premjerministra ar piedāvājumu strādāt Ministru kabinetā. Kad premjerministrs piezvana, viņu uzaicina kļūt par Administratīvo lietu ministru. Jaunais ministrs nolemj pildīt savas partijas vēlēšanu solījumu – izveidot atklātu un caurspīdīgu valdību, publiski atceļot nozīmīgu līgumu, ko iepriekšējā valdība izdevusi kopā ar kādu amerikāņu tehnoloģiju firmu. Sers Hamfrijs pret to iebilst, zinot, ka drīzumā gaidāmi svarīgi viesi no ASV valdības.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Ministrs ir atbildīgs par Burandas prezidenta oficiālo vizīti. Hekers nolemj, ka visiem vajadzētu doties uz Balmorālas pili, nevis likt karalienei doties uz Londonu. Tikai nedēļu pirms vizītes prezidents tiek gāzts apvērsumā, un pretēji Hamfrija ieteikumam ministrs uzstāj, ka vizītei ir jānotiek. Redzot, kas jaunajam prezidentam ir sakāms savā oficiālajā runā par britu varas jūgu, viņš saprot, ka valdība atrodas uz katastrofas sliekšņa.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Ministrs nolemj, ka valdība pārāk daudz iznieko naudu, un nolemj, ka ir pienācis laiks sākt ekonomēt. Sers Hamfrijs iesaka ministram rādīt piemēru un atlaist savus darbiniekus. Drīz vien viņš paliek bez šofera un sekretāres, un iestājas haoss.

programme.title: Jā, ministra kungs!
programme.desc: Ministrs vēlas nodrošināt pilsoņiem piekļuvi viņu failiem jaunajā valsts datubāzē, taču sers Hamfrijs iebilst. Hakers nolemj, ka ir jārīkojas. Ņemot vērā sava priekšgājēja, tagad opozīcijas deputāta, padomu, viņš veiksmīgi paredz visus sera Hamfrija liktos šķēršļus, taču galu galā viņš izmanto ierēdņu taktiku, lai panāktu savu.

programme.title: Florbols. Latvijas čempionāts vīriešiem
programme.desc: Tradicionāli lielais fināls florbolā vīriešiem notiek lielākajā Rīgas arēnā, un finālā ir tikai viena spēle. Šoreiz līdz pusfinālam tika četras labākās komandas pamatturnīrā: "Masters Ulbroka / LU", "Rubene", Talsu "NSS Krauzers" un Cēsu "Lekrings". Pēdējās divās sezonās lielajā finālā spēlēja Ulbrokas un Talsu florbolisti, abas reizes uzvarot Ulbrokas komandai. Šogad gan tas nav iespējams, jo abas komandas savā starpā tikās jau pusfinālā, un te nedaudz labākas sekmes bija ulbrokiešiem, kas arī pamatturnīrā ieņēma pirmo vietu. Raudzīsim, kā būs tagad, jo jau pusfinālos cīņas bija ļoti spraigas, tur bija jācīnās sērijā līdz kādas komandas četrām uzvarām, bet lielajā finālā var būt arī nejaušība. Ir tikai viena cīņa, ja kādai komandai ļoti labi aiziet spēle un otrajai nav tā labākā diena, tad atspēlēties ir grūti. Jādomā, atkal būs lieliska atmosfēra un gana pilnas tribīnes ar kārtīgu atbalstu abām finālistēm.

programme.title: Atgriešanās paradīzē
programme.desc: Londonas policijas inspektore Makenzija Klārka atgriežas dzimtajā pilsētiņā Austrālijā. Daudzi vietējie nav priecīgi, ieraugot Makenziju, un arī viņa pati vēlas pēc iespējas ātrāk tikt prom. Sevišķi neveikla ir atkalredzēšanās ar tiesu medicīnas ekspertu Glenu, kas kādreiz bijis Makenzijas līgavainis, un viņa māti Filomenu, policijas priekšnieci. Taču izrādās, ka Makenziju Londonā tik drīz vēl negaida atpakaļ un vietējai policijai vajadzīga pieredzējuša slepkavību izmeklētāja palīdzība.

programme.title: Melnais saraksts
programme.desc: Kritiķu un skatītāju iemīļots kriminālseriāls. Tā darbība sākas dienā, kad darbu FIB galvenajā birojā Vašingtonā uzsāk jauna profilētāja Elizabete Kīna. Tajā pašā rītā tur ierodas viens no FIB meklētākajiem noziedzniekiem, Reimonds "Reds" Redingtons, un labprātīgi ļauj sevi notvert. Reds palīdz FIB sagūstīt citu bīstamu noziedznieku un novērst uzbrukumu civiliedzīvotājiem. Viņš paziņo, ka viņam esot vesels saraksts un informācija par tādiem noziedzniekiem un teroristiem, par kuru esamību FIB pat nenojauš. Reds ir gatavs sadarboties ar vienu savādu noteikumu – viņš runās tikai ar Elizabeti. Tā sākas īpašas attiecības, kuru īstā daba un iemesls ir zināmi tikai Redingtonam. Lai gan pamatā seriāla darbība norit ASV, tas aizved arī uz dažādām eksotiskām vietām visā pasaulē un ļauj ieskatīties kriminālajā pasaulē. Dažādiem apbalvojumiem vairāku gadu laikā izvirzīti seriāla specefektu veidotāji, kaskadieri un muzikālais noformējums.

programme.title: Literatūre
programme.desc: Kurzemes vējš var noraut vārdiem galotnes un uzgāzt egli mājas jumtam, kur mitinājies Ziemupes Jūrnieks no Janas Egles stāsta. Liepājas rūdītais dzejnieks Olafs Gūtmanis (Tautas frontes himnas vārdu autors) mēdza atgriezties izsūtījuma vietā Sibīrijā, lai tur baudītu vienpatību. Gūtmanis bija dzejas skolotājs liepājniecei Janai Eglei. Rakstot dzeju, viņa nobrieda prozai, kurā nebaidās stāstīt par tautas "tumšajiem kuitiem".

programme.title: Literatūre
programme.desc: No tā, kurš ar Preiļu konceptuālistiem gravā – Alfabētdzimtenes ūdeņos gāzies, Burti vairs neatstāsies – neizžūs, neatmazgāsies… Literatūre, re, maģiskās zīmes nu Gustavā Tavā – Lai Slava! Einārs Pelšs. Un Andis Surgunts, kurš dzīvoja turpat kaimiņos. Literatūrē Preiļu konceptuālisti.

programme.title: Vides fakti
programme.desc: Raidījums par norisēm dabā un apkārtējā vidē. "Vides fakti" sniedz informāciju par sezonālām norisēm dabā un dzīvnieku pasaulē, par vides aktualitātēm, par videi draudzīgu dzīvesveidu, par aktuālām cilvēka un vides attiecībām ārpus Latvijas robežām. Raidījumā "Vides fakti" ir skatāmi arī piedzīvojumu sižeti par aktīvā tūrisma iespējām Latvijā, kā arī īsfilmas par neparastiem ceļojumiem pasaulē.

programme.title: Kultūrdeva
programme.desc: "Kultūrdevā" viesosies scenogrāfs un vizuālās telpas režisors Reinis Dzudzilo. Viņa veidotā scenogrāfija sagādā konceptuālus pārsteigumus. Režisores Ineses Mičules jauniestudējuma "Ugunī" vizuālā dramaturģija atspoguļo dalību ilgtspējas projektā "Greenstage", un šīs izrādes vajadzībām cilvēki tika aicināti ziedot savas līgavu kleitas. "Kultūrdevas" otrajā daļā uz sarunu aicinātas māte un meita Aīda un Aurēlija Rancānes. Lieldienu laikā studijā muzicēs folkgrupa "Grodi".

programme.title: Lielās patiesības
programme.desc: "Vai Kristum būs, pie kā otrreiz atnākt?" – saasināti provokatīvs jautājums, ko Lieldienu "Lielajās patiesībās" raidījuma vadītājs Ilmārs Latkovskis uzdod teologam, LU profesoram Ralfam Kokinam. Viens no Ralfa Kokina teoloģisko pētījumu tematiem ir Bībeles vēstījumi par ekoloģijas aktuālajām problēmām. Saruna būs arī par kristietības saistību ar dabas ritiem. Cita starpā Ralfs Kokins ir arī aizrautīgs portretu fotogrāfs un grāmatas "Kurzemes vilkaču nostāsti" autors, kas galīgi nav mūsdienu mācītājiem ierasts temats.

programme.title: Daudz laimes, jubilār!
programme.desc: Kā mūsdienu bērniem rokās ielikt Jāņa Jaunsudrabiņa "Balto grāmatu" vai, vēl izaicinošāk, Annas Brigaderes triloģiju "Dievs. Daba. Darbs"? Un piedāvāt šajos darbos uzkavēties ilgstoši? Lai kā mēs gribētu, lai jaunā paaudze jūsmo par mūsu literatūras dvēselisko klasiku, citas atbildes visticamāk nebūs kā: "Neiespējamā misija!" Un tam nevar nepiekrist - šaubas rada gan darbu poētiskais lēnīgums, gan jauniešiem nepazīstamie pagātnes lauku dzīves termini, gan arī garie gadalaiku apraksti. Šķiet, tie ir nepārvarami šķēršļi. Tikai ne režisoram un aktierim Jānim Znotiņam. Proti, tieši šos, augstāk pieminētos, izaicinošos literāros darbus viņš ir pavēris ļoti plašai bērnu un jauniešu teātra izrāžu auditorijai. Ar gudru, mīlošu, uz bērnu vērstu stratēģiju viņš šos un citus gadiem plauktos stāvošos sējumus, kā arī latviešu un igauņu dzejasdarbus, kopā ar Anci Muižnieci veidotus oriģināldarbus, iznesis skatuves prožektoru gaismā, un, bērnu pamanīti, tie turpina dzīvot. Neatlaidīgi pētot bērnu un jauniešu auditoriju, Jānis Znotiņš saka: "Man ir ļoti svarīgi, ka tam, ko daru, ir pievienotā vērtība. Lai es to daru ne tikai tāpēc vien, ka man pašam patīk." Raidījuma "Daudz laimes, jubilār!" viesa darbošanos ar bērniem un pusaudžiem var dēvēt arī par misiju vai kalpošanu. Kas nozīmē: nevis darbošanos bērnu un pusaudžu auditorijai domāto teātra izrāžu veidošanā, bet gan - darbošanos ar šo auditoriju: "Bērniem ir ļoti svarīgi apzināties, ka mums interesē tas, kas viņiem ir svarīgi. Mēs bieži domājam: ai, ko nu mazie, viņiem vēl jāizaug! Tad, kad viņiem būs 18, nu tad jā - tad mēs parunāsim. Bet nē, tieši tagad ir jārunā, jāklausās, jāpamana. Un jāceļ augšā arī neērtie jautājumi." Jānis ir ļoti aizrautīgs tajā, ko dara: "Un es ļoti gribu cerēt, ka Dievs man ir devis šo īpašo talantu. Jo es vēlos turpināt!".

programme.title: V.I.P. - Veiksme. Intuīcija. Prāts
programme.desc: Otrās Lieldienas izskan, un mēs esam gatavi noskaidrot, kurš šogad šūposies visaugstāk arī erudīcijā. Laipni lūgti finālā, kur katrs jautājums paceļ spriedzi kā labi iešūpotas šūpoles. Šovakar spēlē komandas ar kapteiņiem Edgaru Ražinski un Madi Jeti. Janci Edgars Ražinskis - komandas kapteinis. Strādā Rīgas plānošanas reģionā, ir tūrisma nozares profesionālis un pasniedzējs, studējis uzņēmējdarbību un antropoloģiju. Klubā "Edgari United" darbojas kopš tā pirmsākumiem 2021. gadā. Līdz ar briedumu no smailes uzbrucēja ir pārtapis par vārtsargu Edgars Jēkabsons - bērnībā sapņojis kļūt par programmētāju, tas arī noticis. Ir informāciju tehnoloģiju speciālists un politiķis. Edgars pievienojās "Edgari United" klubam 2022. gada septembrī. Sirdi priecē ātri, eleganti un labi lietojami IT risinājumi. Papildu hobijs ir politika Raimonds Ķirķis - dzejnieks, atdzejotājs un literatūrkritiķis. Studējis kultūras teoriju, menedžmentu un vēsturi, filozofiju. Kluba "Edgari United" pirmajā diplomu pasniegšanā saņēmis galveno balvu par sniegumu 2023. gadā, vēlāk gan spēles līmenis ir krities. Ir "Ostapenko" kausa vairākkārtējs ieguvējs. Interesē literatūra un labais stils Made Jete Jance - komandas kapteine. Studējusi pedagoģiju, strādā reklāmas nozarē. Made Jete ir dzimumu vienlīdzības veicinātāja futbola laukumā. Vairākkārtēja balvas "Miss Zelta bucis" ieguvēja klubā. Brīvo laiku pavada arī basketbola laukumā, dodas garos pārgājienos. Sporta entuziaste, kaislīga hokeja un basketbola fane Kaspars Kalniņš - ikdienā brauc pa Latviju un veic dzērienu ražošanas iekārtu uzstādīšanu un apkopi. Futbolā savu spēles stilu raksturo ar vārdiem - galvenais uzbrukums ir aizsardzība. "Edgariem" pievienojies pērnajā vasarā. Bez futbola un pārgājieniem vēl atrod laiku tautas deju mēģinājumiem un koncertiem. Eriks Dekoneks - maizi pelna ar darbu ofisā un ir ceļā uz jaunām virsotnēm, proti, autovadītāja apliecību. Klubam "Edgari United" pievienojies pērnā gada novembrī. Komandas diriģents ar snaipera precizitāti. Bez futbola - literāts: rakstnieks un tulkotājs. Kā pats atzīst, viņa sirds pieder divām lietām - Prāgai un mīļotajai sievietei.

programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Lost Cities combines hi-tech archaeology, breath-taking visuals and genuine exploration to make headline-grabbing discoveries. Lost Cities brings adventure, science and archaeology together through our host Albert Lin. Our ambitious approach applies 3D scanning to some of the most extraordinary sites of antiquity. This series will deliver powerful, emotional stories with hi-tech imagery to bring the mysteries of the past vividly to life.

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond journeys to discover the startling Engineering Connections behind the Troll A gas platform; the largest object ever moved by man across the surface of the Earth. During his voyage he reveals that Troll A owes its incredible design to a 19th Century French gardener, a 17th Century German mayor, a midwestern American architect and the dawn of the motor industry. Hidden in its DNA he finds a crystal glass, a farm building, a racing car, a plant pot and nothing!

programme.title: Engineering Connections
programme.desc: Richard Hammond travels to Taipei and discovers the secrets of one of the worlds tallest buildings, Taipei 101. This modern marvel of engineering stands at a jaw dropping 1671 feet. Built right next to a seismic fault line and in a typhoon hotspot its height is all the more impressive. Richard discovers just what it is in the Taipei 101s DNA, that allows it be so tall and cope with these extreme natural events. And what all this cutting edge engineering has in common with a bird cage, bamboo, racing yachts, sports cars and seat belts. Richard embarks on a fantastic journey of discovery that will take him from the mines of 18th century England via the early skyscrapers of Chicago to the top of one of the most advanced buildings in the world.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: When the Russians arrived by the 18th century, Alaskan Native peoples had been there for thousands of years, developing and perfecting sophisticated ways to thrive in the harshest of environments. Their traditions and methods have been passed down from generation to generation, and against all odds, theyve been able to keep their customs and unique way of life intact. Yet, it remains constant danger of extinction. In the face of Alaskas changing and brutal landscape, an ever-dwindling number of Alaskan Native peoples have but one recourse: to live as their ancestors did…and to teach subsequent generations everything about living with and from the landscape. In LIFE BELOW ZERO: FIRST ALASKANS, this brand-new returnable observational documentary series follows a select few of the original inhabitants who are relying on ancient wisdom, as well as hunting, building and survival techniques, to ensure their survival for the next thousand years. This is a celebration of culture, tradition and incredible strength by an inspirational group of people who always manage to find a way to live another day.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Working with their families, Indigenous Peoples of Alaska thrive and survive in the lands of their ancestors. Tig Strassburg trains his daughters to hunt for moose. Jody Potts-Joseph returns home to her native village of Eagle. Along with his sister, niece, and great-niece, Marvin Agnot fishes for halibut. And Daniel Apassingok works with his daughter as she pursues her first seal.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Moments after taking off from a windswept Norwegian island, the pilots of Widerøe Flight 839 hear a disturbing noise and then struggle to keep their plane level. And—after only 65 seconds in the air—their twin turboprop nosedives into the North Atlantic, killing everyone on board. In the wreckage, investigators discover damage to a critical steering component. And when they learn that another Widerøe flight nearly met the same fate at Værøys notoriously tricky airport, they diagnose a perfect storm of controversial decisions that put lives at ris

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: Three horrifying accidents capture the worlds attention, and in order to solve these deadly mysteries, hero investigators are pushed to the limit to uncover the hidden clues. A commercial jet plunges into the Florida Everglades and investigators face one of the most hazardous scenes imaginable. When a Boeing 777 crash lands at Heathrow Airport, investigators cant find anything wrong with the aircraft. And, a devastating crash shatters a Scottish village becoming the largest crime scene in the world.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. Introducing Food Factory, a mesmerizing peek behind the scenes of the weird and wonderful processes that produce everyones favorite foods. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

programme.desc: Behind each bag of chips, can of beer, candy bar, or loaf of bread, lies a mega-industrial production line that brings each product to the masses. From raw materials to finished products, Food Factory reveals in awe-inspiring detail how mass-produced favorites are really made. Put on a hardhat and get ready to meet the food!

What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: Under the muck of a Danish bog, a 2,400-year-old body is found so perfectly preserved the stubble on the dead mans chin is visible … as is the rope around his neck. Is this ancient cold case what it seems? At the turn of the 20th century, physician Albert Abrams was inspired to apply the new discovery of radio waves to medicine. He invented a complex-looking machine to diagnose any disease. Thousands flocked to be tested, but the establishment was skeptical. At Berlins Neues Museum, a bust of Egypts Queen Nefertiti portrays a woman so stunning that she has become synonymous with flawless beauty. But when experts use advanced techniques to look beneath the surface, new questions are raised about the queens appearance.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: The lost colony of Roanoke is a historic mystery that has not been solved for over 400 years. An intriguing artifact was discovered in 1937: the Dare Stone. Apparently written by John White, it explains in detail what happened to the vanished colony. But is it real? World War I was the first major conflict to feature warplanes and, therefore, also the first to feature anti-air defence. How did an object resembling a satellite dish on wheels help gunners shoot down enemy planes? In Egypt, excavations of the Great Sphinx of Giza in 1817 uncovered six carved hunks of stone. Put together, they appear to be fragments of a large, braided stone beard, in the style of false beards worn by ancient pharaohs. The Sphinx never wore a beard … or did it?

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: Emergency at Toronto International Airport when a flight carrying 80 passengers and crew crashes on landing on runway 23. As the airport goes into an immediate ground stop, cancelling all outbound flights and diverting incoming aircraft, the teams on the ground are pushed to their limit trying to manage the chaos that ensues when you close Canadas busiest airport.

programme.title: Toronto Airport Uncovered
programme.desc: A huge winter storm slams into Toronto International Airport. The Airfield Inspector unit urgently tracks down a blown-over sign before it becomes a hazard. The airport is down to one runway as snow ploughs clear the other. They have 15 minutes before snow makes the live runway unsafe. A jack-knifed Boeing 787 throws operations into chaos. Final

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: The volatile climate of Southeast Alaska challenges Port Protections residents who live on the edge of society. Gary battles father time while securing needed resources. Curly pushes through in the wake of a tragic loss. Mary faces her fears to survive in extreme conditions. Sam fights to preserve the only lifestyle hes ever known. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: The volatile climate of Southeast Alaska challenges Port Protections residents who live on the edge of society. Gary battles father time while securing needed resources. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Lawless Island

Curly pushes through in the wake of a tragic loss. Mary faces her fears to survive in extreme conditions. Sam fights to preserve the only lifestyle hes ever known. Squibb looks to improve upon his surroundings. And Stuart deals with past injuries as he battles the elements.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot introduces a new "team" of canine friends to her far-flung Yukon homestead; On a remote island in Newfoundland, Matty makes a big move with a home that is far from new; Billy races to replace his ailing roof before the fast-approaching Canadian winter arrives; and Emilie and Gilbert take to the backwoods on a bush-building adventure they hope will keep them safer from the larger, local fauna.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: In the Yukon, Margot takes her fledgling dog sled team on their inaugural multi-day trapping trip. Billy takes to the woods in search of a more traditional way of living off and on the land. Matty goes all in on the renovation of his ancient Newfoundland seaside home, while Emilie and Gilbert take advantage of an early freeze-up and head out trapping, in search of an essential resource that makes its winter home beneath the ice. Final

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: Frigid temperatures wreak havoc on Dawson City. A midnight call to a truck fire in -30°C weather finds the crew fighting to extinguish the flames and rescue the driver. Later, the cold snap bursts pipes across town, and Chief Mikes team must put their fears aside as they respond to a toxic gas leak. Meanwhile, Yukon communities near the Klondike Highway are cut off from supplies after an avalanche shuts down the main throughway. Avalanche technician Colin takes to the air to break up the snowpack, but when his bombs bounce off the dense, frozen snow, hes forced to come up with a new plan to open up the road.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of historys most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Guerilla Gold Rush: Deadly Endeavor
programme.desc: Investigative reporter Mariana Van Zeller uncovers the dark side of gold mining. Gold has fueled dreams and vast wealth in Colombian life for centuries. And everyone is chasing after it—corporate mining companies, artisanal miners, and armed groups. Van Zeller meets face-to-face with illegal river miners, a former intelligence officer, and a masked guerilla commander to get the inside story.

programme.title: Narco State: Aftermath
programme.desc: In 2009, Ciudad Juárez, Mexico, was called murder capital. Phoenix, USA, was experiencing a rise in kidnappings. More than ten years later, we return to these cities to explore how the smuggling of guns, drugs, money and people connect the U.S. and Mexico in ways that go beyond their shared border.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue

programme.title: Yukon Rescue
programme.desc: In the dead of night, the Dawson City Fire Department receives multiple 911 calls, sending the small crew of volunteers into action to save a historic building and a family home. Pushed to the brink and stretched thin, Chief Mike embarks on a mission to be better prepared to protect Dawsons community and history from the worst-case scenario. In Whitehorse, a series of snowstorms torments the city. As the sun sets, a snowmobiler stuck in deep snow makes a desperate call for help. Helicopter pilot Adam Fox faces the challenge of getting the citizen and the snowmobile to safety. Meanwhile, out on the highway, icy conditions send a vehicle careening off the road, and Rays life is in jeopardy as he attempts to retrieve it alone.

programme.title: Dutch Caribbean Coastguards
programme.desc: We went on a mission with the Coast Guard of Curaçao, Aruba, Bonaire and Sint Maarten. Every day they carry out impressive operations, from rescuing tourists in distress to intercepting drug shipments at sea and receiving undocumented immigrants. This important and also dangerous work is done by a team of committed professionals, who guarantee safety in the Caribbean Sea with the help of ships and helicopters. They are supported by the Royal Netherlands Navy.

programme.title: Dutch Caribbean Coastguards
programme.desc: We went on a mission with the Coast Guard of Curaçao, Aruba, Bonaire and Sint Maarten. programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Is It Real? sorts the facts from fiction in modern-day myths about supernatural phenomena. The show explores some of the more common myths such as crop circles and ghosts, as well as some of the far out myths like spontaneous human combustion. The series looked at these topics from a skeptical point of view, going at them with the attitude of, "Oh yeah? Then prove it." Frequently, the people making the more outrageous claims could not.

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Do you believe in hauntings? Since time immemorial, people have believed in the dead returning from the grave to haunt the living. But ""haunting"" itself is not a technical term. Its a general description of a paranormal phenomenon usually recurring in one particular location. A haunting can incorporate ghosts, poltergeists, demonic possession…and really anything else that gives you the heebie-geebies. But are hauntings real? We examine three cases from around the world to see if science can explain what so many believers cannot. First, we head to Long Island and the famous case, which led to ""The Amityville Horror"" its the story of the Lutzes, who move into their dream house at 112 Ocean Avenue, only to find themselves running for their lives just 28 days later. But was this a real horror story or just a hoax? Next, we go to Wilder, Kentucky, to a supposedly haunted country and western bar Bobby Mackeys Music World complete with a mechanical bull…that is believed to turn on without power. Can science hoe down with the supernatural in this haunted honky tonk? Finally, we conduct our own experiment on hauntings by filming ghost enthusiasts who have agreed to spend the night in what is supposedly one of the most haunted places in the United Kingdom: Muncaster Castle. Will they even make it through the night? With psychologists Jason Braithwaite and Jim Houran, we will conduct tests on electromagnetic energy, carbon monoxide and infrasound to see if science can explain what many of us see when the lights go out. Join us in an intriguing investigation at the crossroads of science and the supernatural, with results that just might scare you to death.

programme.title: Is It Real?
programme.desc: Is It Real? sorts the facts from fiction in modern-day myths about supernatural phenomena. The show explores some of the more common myths such as crop circles and ghosts, as well as some of the far out myths like spontaneous human combustion. The series looked at these topics from a skeptical point of view, going at them with the attitude of, "Oh yeah? Then prove it." Frequently, the people making the more outrageous claims could not.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Indigenous Alaskans pass on traditional values to their children and share their connection to the land they have always inhabited. John and Teresa Pingayak join their grown daughters on a seal hunt. Tig Strassburg and Louise Moses show their daughters how to set a fish net. Joel Jacko upgrades the sustainability of his home. And Marvin Agnot teaches his grand-niece how to harvest a deer.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Indigenous Peoples of Alaska rebuild their communities after Typhoon Merbok. John and Teresa Pingayak travel to camp to assess the damage and recover their shelter. Daniel and Nalu Apassingok try their luck at seal hunting and recover a boat. Tig and Evan Strassburg set spring pole snares in hopes of catching rabbits. And Joel Jacko travels to a remote lake to fish for pike ahead of winter.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of historys most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: Safety in the sky depends on the outcome of air crash investigations. But sometimes investigators disagree, and the pressure intensifies when the victims are famous. A crash carrying the Manchester United football team sparks an international argument. A storm of controversy ignites when a planeload of US military personnel goes down in a fiery blaze. And, conspiracy theories erupt on both sides when the president of Poland is killed in a crash en route to Russia.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: What started as a one-man operation has grown into a massive hot-sauce empire that now sells more than 40 million bottles of spicy Sriracha every year. This ancient fruit was popular with Egyptian pharaohs, and today every 16-ounce bottle of California-grown POM Wonderful contains the juice of four Wonderful pomegranates. A traditional Mexican treat you can eat on the go, these spicy pork tamales are hand-wrapped in cornhusks before being steamed and x-rayed.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Making astronaut food is serious business at this massive Oregon facility where it takes 18 hours to transform savory beef stew into a freeze-dried meal thats perfect for outer space. Nearly 200 million squeaky clean California lemons are washed, waxed, sized, and sorted at this Sunkist plant every year. Its worth the drive to Texas just to get your hands on this decadent pecan pie, and if the bakery is closed once you get there, the vending machine outside is open 24/7.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz travel to Stroud in Gloucestershire to take on a 1973 Hillman Imp which has been abandoned for decades in a dusty barn. The car belongs to former NHS theatre nurse Margaret (70) who has owned and loved Imps since she first started to drive. Her beloved car nicknamed "Tin Lizzie" was her pride and joy until it started to need a lot of work to keep it on the road. Aided by her husband Margaret started work on the car but mid restoration her husband passed away with COPD. Her father who took over the project but he also died shortly after, leaving mother of two Margaret without the time or the knowhow to complete the job. By the time Tim and Fuzz take the car on it has rusted away so badly its barely a car. The Hillman Imp was compact saloon manufactured by the Rootes group in the 1960s and 70s and was their answer to the popular Austin Mini, it was a hugely innovative car with a rear mounted engine that was completely made of aluminium, but due to high production costs and frequent strike action in the 1970s it ended up getting the reputation as the car that killed off the company.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Making motoring dreams come true for an eighth season award winning Car SOS is back, and this time its bigger and better than ever. Everyones favourite petrol heads Fuzz Townshend and Tim Shaw continue their mission to seek out classic cars with deserving owners. Using all their guile and restoration knowledge their aim is to sneak away clapped out classics without their owners knowing then in a blizzard of grease and grime and hard graft get the much loved motors back where they deserve to be, on the road .In this series the boys take on their biggest challenges ever. Chronic rust, hard to find parts and broken engines test the boys to their limits. Car ranging across eight decades from a vintage tourer to a 1990s Japanese supercar, from an iconic German sports coupe to a very rare British rally winner, and, for their lucky owners the surprise they will never forget. There will be tears, there will be laughter on this automotive rollercoaster and one thing that will be guaranteed - there will be some very beautiful cars.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are challenged to take on probably their most obscure car to date - a little known Cannon trials competition car. Car trialling is the worlds second oldest motorsport, and involves taking specially adapted cars up steep slippery hills and through thick mud courses, it was huge in the 1950s and 60s but today is less well known. Cannon cars were probably the most famous and successful cars on the trialling circuit - all hand-made by Tasmanian farmer Mike Cannon, who settled in the UK in the 1950s to build cars. One of the most successful cars that Cannon produced was known as Goldfinger as it was built in 1964 - the same year the Bond film of the same name was released - and it is that very car that Tim and Fuzz have been called in to fix. The car is owned by former bus driver Dean - a car trialling fanatic whose active life was tragically cut short eight years ago when he suffered a catastrophic stroke that resulted in him having an inability to communicate. Dean is now slowly recovering but the part of his brain that deals with speech was all but destroyed meaning he has had to relearn how to speak and also he still suffers regular seizures. In their quest to find out more about trialling Tim and Fuzz end up in a full blown event - you will have to watch the programme to find out how they did.

programme.title: Superstructures: Engineering Marvels
programme.desc: This brand new series reveals the extraordinary feats of engineering hidden inside the worlds most spectacular man-made constructions. From the worlds biggest plane and largest free-spanning dome to the tallest building and the largest space ship, each superstructure is taken apart using state-of-the-art CGI and insight from world class specialists to reveal the startling innovations that turn it from dream to reality.

programme.title: Superstructures: Engineering Marvels
programme.desc: This brand new series reveals the extraordinary feats of engineering hidden inside the worlds most spectacular man-made constructions. From the worlds biggest plane and largest free-spanning dome to the tallest building and the largest space ship, each superstructure is taken apart using state-of-the-art CGI and insight from world class specialists to reveal the startling innovations that turn it from dream to reality.

programme.title: Colossal Machines
programme.desc: Contrary to popular opinion, nuclear energy can be very beneficial. In many industries, its being used to advance technology in unbelievable ways. Forensic and space mission systems engineers explain, in detail, the operation of radioisotope generators and the related systems that have been designed and powered by nuclear energy.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Abandoned structures and machinery on an island near Antarctica point to brief human settlements. Disturbing noises heard by foreign diplomats in Cuba set off research on a possible global psychological phenomenon. Mysterious rubber-like slabs from Indonesia appear on European beaches. A strange stone pattern found in the waters of Floridas Dry Tortugas National Park reveals a long-lost island.

programme.title: Mysterious Islands
programme.desc: Colonial-era shipwrecks lead researchers to one of the greatest vessels in the Age of Exploration; invasive ant species drive volunteers to explore haunted military structures. Intriguing shipwrecks and dark underwater tunnels take divers back in time; massive stone disks found on a tropical island reveal a unique trading system.

programme.title: Decoding Historys Prophecies
programme.desc: When cases run cold, police in 1970s U.S. call upon the services of Dorothy Allison — the most celebrated "psychic detective" of her time. From the kidnapping of Patty Hearst to the crimes of Son of Sam, Allison sometimes provides incredible insights. In the 2010s, John of God is a leading light of the New Age movement with celebrity followers. He calls himself a psychic healer, but those closest to the man know that the truth is darker than anyone can imagine. In the first century C.E., Jewish commander Josephus is captured by the Romans. Apparently using ancient prophecy for political ends, he tells his captor, Roman General Vespasian, that he is prophesied to rule the world. The consequences have far-reaching effects on human history.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Stories of suspects who almost got away from Airport Security Colombia and Peru. A farmer swaps his suitcase with an accomplice in the terminal. A man who ingested cocaine is able to board a plane, but through international police coordination, is apprehended at his destination. A man with capsules in his stomach holds out for 36 hours and must be released. His sister is arrested. Cocaine cargo has been chemically disguised to fool officials.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: The biggest cocaine busts from Airport Security Colombia and Peru. A man traveling to the DR, hides cocaine in childrens organizers. A stepmom and daughter conceal bricks of cocaine inside jackets. A mother with a child carries cocaine in food packages and kids clothes. The Anti-narcotics police find cocaine in a shipment of fresh herbs. A man going to Mexico with cocaine bricks in his carry-on. A man with liquid cocaine in beverage bottles.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Decoding Historys Prophecies
programme.desc: In 16th-century France, astrologer Nostradamus wrote hundreds of cryptic verses implying impossible knowledge of future events, including the French Revolution, the Second World War, the assassination of JFK, and the attacks of Sept. 11, 2001. Who was Nostradamus, and what did he say? In Central Europe, local legends say Houska Castle guards a portal to hell and is the site of dark, storied history. Here, young poet Karel Hynek Macha had a feverish dream of a future that terrified him. In medieval Italy, St. Francis of Assisi was subjected to the worlds first case of stigmata, receiving the wounds of the Christian messiah on his hands, feet and torso. Are the stigmata a blessing, a curse, or a traditional blend of legend and truth? Final

programme.title: Decoding Historys Prophecies
programme.desc: In early-1900s Russia, Grigori Rasputin, the professed mystical healer, was both admired and disdained. Some believed he had the czar and czarina under a dark spell. The true Rasputin is hard to decipher, but his claims of prophetic powers led to a controversial and tragic role pivotal to Russian history. In China, a scholar found strange markings on ancient bones that unlocked age-old mysteries. The ancient Chinese believed these "oracle bone" markings could contain traces of the future. In Point Pleasant, West Virginia, a mysterious winged creature is sighted moments before a tragic bridge collapse. The creature, dubbed the "Mothman," sparked decades of debate. Is it real, and did it portend impending doom?

programme.title: Decoding Historys Prophecies
programme.desc: Amid civil war in 14th century Mongol-controlled China, scholar and strategist Liu Bowen lends his talents to a dynasty on the rise. But his name is also remembered for a more mysterious talent: fortune-telling with what some say is frightening precision. A series of cryptic prophecies earns him the moniker of Chinas "Nostradamus." In Ancient Rome, Julius Caesar receives a warning that his life is in danger. The prophecy, uttered by an Etruscan soothsayer, is divined through the strange art of haruspicy. Caesar ignores the omen at his own peril. Amongst the hills of the Scottish Lowlands, the influential Erskine family becomes haunted by a mysterious prophecy, presaging and inflicting countless moments of tragedy and heartbreak.

programme.title: Decoding Historys Prophecies
programme.desc: Edgar Cayce, known as the "sleeping prophet," claims to use hypnotic states to heal the sick and see the future. Cayce is alleged to have predicted the Wall Street Crash of 1929, the Second World War, and the assassination of JFK. His aura stokes fear around his most frightening prediction of all — the end of the world. In Ancient Greece, the Oracle of Delphi is the premier prophesier of the ancient world. The words of this Pythia, channeled down from Apollo, go on to shape human history, foretelling the rise and fall of empires. And in 19th-century France, radical occult thinker Eliphas Levi draws upon early mysticism to develop a spiritual doctrine. Branded as a devil worshiper by the public, the truth of his lifes work is even stranger.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: Exciting documentary series that shows viewers some extreme and extraordinary construction projects- the biggest, tallest, longest or deepest in the world, and the machines that are used to create such amazing structures. The series features interviews with designers and project managers, who present the problems of construction and the methodology or techniques used to overcome obstacles. Some megastructures included in the series are US Navys aircraft carrier, the USS Ronald Reagan, highway with no speed limit built in Germany, undersea tunnel built between France and United Kingdom, worlds longest suspension bridge in Japan, twin tower skyscraper in Kuala Lumpur, etc.

programme.title: Engineering Europe: Compilations
programme.desc: Underground, over mountains and across water, Europes landscapes demand all forms of transportation to connect its citizens. The iconic 139-year-old Tower Bridge in London, which sees thousands of commuters every day, must be ready at a given moment to stop traffic and let boats through. The lesser-known Galecopperbrug in Utrecht, Netherlands, needs to undergo a major renovation to support its steel cables. Meanwhile, extensive and innovative renovations in the middle of Amsterdam will revolutionize rail and bike traffic, while a high-speed railway in the mountainous Basque Country of Spain will create a network that connects commuters to major cities. Engineers need to be cunning, innovative and flexible to keep up with the modern-day demands of European transportation.

programme.title: Engineering Europe: Compilations
programme.desc: Embark on a thrilling journey across Europe to uncover several extraordinary feats of engineering and innovation. Stunning visuals and expert interviews take you from Denmarks Storstrøm Bridge — a symbol of resilience and connectivity — to the enchanting Dutch Castle de Haar and the avant-garde Hotel Marques de Riscal in Rioja, Spain. Experience the complex ingenuity of the Friesen Rail Bridge in Germany, then venture beneath London to reveal how the mighty "Super Sewer" is transforming urban life. Witness the Dutch Delta Works defending millions from the sea and explore the enduring craftsmanship of the Royal Bodewes shipyard. Through stories and conversations with engineers, discover how relentless ingenuity has shaped these iconic landmarks, forever redefining whats possible across Europe.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: The biggest cocaine busts from Airport Security Colombia and Peru. A man traveling to the DR, hides cocaine in childrens organizers. A stepmom and daughter conceal bricks of cocaine inside jackets. A mother with a child carries cocaine in food packages and kids clothes. The Anti-narcotics police find cocaine in a shipment of fresh herbs. A man going to Mexico with cocaine bricks in his carry-on. A man with liquid cocaine in beverage bottles.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: Stories of suspects who almost got away from Airport Security Colombia and Peru. A farmer swaps his suitcase with an accomplice in the terminal. A man who ingested cocaine is able to board a plane, but through international police coordination, is apprehended at his destination. A man with capsules in his stomach holds out for 36 hours and must be released. His sister is arrested. Cocaine cargo has been chemically disguised to fool officials.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: As dark winter approaches, subsistence Alaskans use the waning daylight to prepare for the difficult season ahead. Tig Strassburg stalks a lone wolf on the prowl in his village. Jamey and Jody Potts-Joseph find crippling damage to their new home on the Yukon. Joel Jacko desperately pursues a moose before hunting season ends. The Apassingok Family struggles to prepare for an oncoming winter storm.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Challenged by weather, predator, and policy, Alaskans survive and thrive on their native arctic lands. Joel Jacko faces off against an increasingly bold bear. Tig Strassburg and Louise Moses try their luck at catching fish under the frozen river. The Apassingok family stake out the Bering Sea in search of fresh meat. And Marvin Agnot battles the tides to collect king crab for his family.

programme.title: Last of the Giants
programme.desc: Cyril and his team embark on an unprecedented adventure in the wildest, dangerous and unexplored regions of the world. Their mission: to find the last endangered species of giant fish and take samples for scientific purposes in order to better understand the exact causes of their disappearance. Their challenge: survive in hostile environments and extreme conditions to protect these impressive aquatic creatures.

programme.title: Last of the Giants
programme.desc: Time is running out, and the team must return to the Fraser River to find and tag the 300-pound giant white sturgeon they are looking for. But first, they have to find their way out of the remote wilderness to deliver their salmon samples. Stranded by severe weather, theyll need to survive brutal rapids, rappel down terrifying cliffs, climb a massive glacier, and hike across rugged mountains if they want to succeed. And with a massive prehistoric fish finally on the line, the guys are in for a white-knuckled end to their northern mission.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation Special Report
programme.desc: In 1981, the Federal Aviation Administration established the sterile cockpit rule requiring pilots to refrain from non-essential activities during critical phases of flight. When this rule is broken, the resulting distraction can be deadly. Passengers fight for their lives inside a burning plane at Dallas Fort Worth Airport. A brand new L-1011 crashes in a remote swamp in the Florida Everglades. And, during a demonstration flight, a brand new Russian Superjet slams into a mountain south of Jakarta.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bees
programme.desc: National Geographic Explorer Bertie Gregory explores the extraordinary lives of bees — among the planets most important animals. Over three years, special cameras opened a rare window into a single hive, revealing their hidden world. But with more than 20,000 bee species pollinating one-third of the worlds food, this series uncovers their astonishing architecture and intelligence, unlocking their secrets.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter is the most punishing of seasons, a time of year when many animals seek shelter in order to hibernate, but others must face the harshness of their environment. This documentary series showcases the ruthless beauty of this icy season, revealing the animals who thrive in their freezing conditions and the animals who simply fight for survival. When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter is the most punishing of seasons, a time of year when many animals seek shelter in order to hibernate, but others must face the harshness of their environment. This documentary series showcases the ruthless beauty of this icy season, revealing the animals who thrive in their freezing conditions and the animals who simply fight for survival. When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Winter of the Bear
programme.desc: In the forests of northern Finland, survival is a race against the seasons. For a mother brown bear, life between winters is a relentless battle as a single mother. She wakes from hibernation, thin and weary, to guide cubs through a fleeting summer. They need food, and shell teach them everything, not least of all, avoiding dangerous males during mating season and facing wolves in a deadly fight for food. Every day counts in these forests. When winter returns, only the strong and the wise will endure this wild, unforgiving land.

programme.title: Secrets of the Octopus
programme.desc: Octopuses were always thought to be natures ultimate loners, preferring their own company. The truth is they have secret social lives. From moms to be hanging out in the deep in their hundreds to an octopus capable of coworking with another species. These aliens of nature are more sociable than ever imagined.

programme.title: Winters Hidden Wonders

When the season finally passes spring is reborn, and it is a celebration for those who managed to survive unscathed.

programme.title: Africas Deadly Kingdom
programme.desc: Instead of providing in-depth examinations of the fauna of the continent of Africa, this nature series alternatively focuses on the hostile and unforgiving landscapes that the animals have to survive in. Africa is home to some of the most extreme and diverse environments on the planet, from arid deserts to lush rainforests, mountainous peaks to mighty river and lake systems, savannah grasslands to rugged coastline. This show explores these different regions and documents how the plants and creatures that inhabit them endure places where there are few resources of food and water or where competition is rife and life-threatening. The unique demands placed on these plants and animals have resulted in the development of incredibly resilient species that remain successful against all the odds.

programme.title: Prairie Dog Manor
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of these cute creatures from northern New Mexico. "Prairie Dog Manor" showcases the unique behaviour of these special animals and highlights the different relationships that exist between the clan members from Valles Caldera National Preserve. Beginning with the prairie dogs preparing for the coming winter, Carl and the pups get ready for hibernation. But they face danger from an unlikely source as deadly predators forge an alliance to threaten every dog in the territory. Further episodes explore the mating season when the warm weather arrives and battles commence between the males to earn the right to mate with the females. Soon, the females are pregnant and new pups arrive and the whole cycle starts again.

programme.title: Prairie Dog Manor

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.desc: Travel to southern Vietnams tropical habitats, home to gibbons and playful macaques, green sea turtles, and Asian black bears. Reintroduced Siamese crocodiles roam the Bau Sau wetlands. The vast Mekong Delta boasts small-clawed otters and thousands of migrating birds, from openbill storks to Oriental darters.

programme.title: Wild Hawaii
programme.desc: Documentary series. Nicknamed The Paradise of the Pacific, Hawaii is an archipelago like no other. Its 137 islands are spread across volcanic topography, with the unstable landscapes constantly changing. Though more renowned for its pristine beaches and luscious palms, Hawaii is a wild and untamed area of brutal, natural beauty. Whether its the unfathomably gigantic waves that crash into its reefs and shores, or the pourings of molten lava from its active volcanoes, the state encompasses all of natures viciousness and peacefulness in one, with an abundance of delightful wildlife thriving on these unsettled islands.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol

programme.title: Asias Wild Secrets
programme.desc: From Sri Lanka to Indonesia and Japan, Asias wild islands teem with some of the worlds wildest creatures. Some arrived by sea, others crossed land bridges when sea levels were lower. But all of them have had to adapt in fascinating ways to their isolated lives. Discover how creatures from the slow loris to the komodo dragon, the mugger crocodile to the proboscis monkey have adapted to island life.

programme.title: Asias Wild Secrets
programme.desc: Tigers cool off in it, fight over it and lie in wait for prey on its edges. Elephants, rhinos and buffalo guzzle it, submerge in it, depend on it. The great hornbill and lion tailed macaques depends on it too, to create forests big enough to sustain them. Hokkaidos brow bears wouldnt survive without it. Whether it comes from the monsoon, from Himalayan meltwater, the tides or snow, ever animal in Asia has a story to tell about water.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: The coastal realm of land and sea is home to two of natures most iconic females - orca and grizzly bears. Under the waves in the Gulf of California, the orca familys success relies on the experience of their sixty-year-old matriarch; while on the beaches of Alaska, a first-time bear mother must raise her three cubs alone and with only her instincts to guide her.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Delve beneath the surface of the largest habitat on Earth - our oceans - to uncover a world of extraordinary extremes from crushing depths to stormy coasts and vast blue deserts to crowded reefs. Oceans are dynamic environments where animals must adapt to life of constant change. Discover how seals fend off sharks; how turtles risk their lives to create their next generation; and how ingenious orca fight to survive in the face of ever-increasing competition.

programme.title: Secrets of the Bees

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Step inside the most frigid habitat known to Earth - the poles. Here, the planets ultimate survivalists include whale-hunting polar bears, leopard-seal dodging penguins and a pack of Arctic wolves that bring down a pair of musk oxen. Polar species have evolved bodies and behaviours that help them combat the intense hostility of their habitats. But now, their world is changing so fast - literally breaking apart under their feet - and their resilience will be tested beyond the extreme.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: The Congo Forest in Central Africa is home to a secretive animal we still know very little about. Bonobos are one of our closest relatives, but in their society its females who rule. A young bonobo must leave behind her family, to find her place in the world. Here, friendship is the key to survival. She must make new friends and impress the alpha female before she can truly fit in.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: The Ethiopian Mountain world is ruled by two very different queens, but both mothers raising daughters. A gelada monkey rules a tight knit sisterhood, but with her only daughter on the cusp of adulthood she must make great sacrifices for her future. On the plateau above, an Ethiopian wolf also has a daughter, but this mother must be ruthless to protect her own legacy.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: The coastal realm of land and sea is home to two of natures most iconic females - orca and grizzly bears. Under the waves in the Gulf of California, the orca familys success relies on the experience of their sixty-year-old matriarch; while on the beaches of Alaska, a first-time bear mother must raise her three cubs alone and with only her instincts to guide her.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: In the heart of Tanzania, the towering walls of the Ngorongoro crater sets a stage for one of the most infamous rivalries in the natural world. The sisters of a formidable lion pride clash with a hyena clan ruled by an all-powerful queen. The sisterhood share responsibility, while the hyena queen must play clan politics and enforce a strict hierarchy to keep her crown.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: The African Savanna is home to the ultimate animal sisterhood; a family of elephants. A new baby will need the familys support to make it through her early vulnerable months. While mom learns how to care for her, it is the babys grandmother, the matriarch, that must protect her. Facing predators, drought and a rapidly changing world can this new baby and her family of iconic females survive?

programme.title: Wild Hunters
programme.desc: Embark on a spectacular journey around the world in search of natures deadliest predators. See how mammals, insects, fish, and birds fight for survival using a fascinating combination of hunting strategies.

programme.title: Hostile Planet
programme.desc: Delve beneath the surface of the largest habitat on Earth - our oceans - to uncover a world of extraordinary extremes from crushing depths to stormy coasts and vast blue deserts to crowded reefs. Oceans are dynamic environments where animals must adapt to life of constant change. Discover how seals fend off sharks; how turtles risk their lives to create their next generation; and how ingenious orca fight to survive in the face of ever-increasing competition.

programme.title: Queens

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais izturas dīvaini. Ko viņš slēpj? Barbabērni darīs visu, lai to uzzinātu. Barbapapas izlemj taupīt elektrību, taču viņu ieceri izjauc Barbagudrais un Barbabella, kas izgudrojuši slepenu elektrību patērējošu projektu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni pielipuši pie televizora, tāpēc vecāki mudina viņus veidot raidījumus. Barbapapas apmeklē evolūcijas muzeju. Programmā: Zemes radīšana, Pirmskembrija perioda zemūdene un... dinozauri!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbazū gatavs palīdzēt, bet Barbagudrais un Barbabella ļaunprātīgi izmanto viņa labestību un padara viņu traku. Barbazū nejauši atklāj spēju atdarināt Barbatēti. Viņš to izmanto, lai sadalītu darbus brāļiem un māsām. Vai viņi to uzzinās?

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls un suņi mēģina uzbūvēt lielu riteņu veikalu līdz Riteņu Festivālam... varbūt Ātrmeistars viņus apsteigs! Kad Motore atsakās iet vannā pirms ģimenes fotografēšanās, Rablam un suņiem jāatrod risinājums.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad vējaina diena traucē būvēt saldējuma veikalu, Rabls, Miksa un Čārdžers ķeras pie darba. Rātsnamā kaut kas mistiski čīkst. Mērs Greitveja lūdz Rablam un Čārdžeram to atrast un salabot pirms viņas runas.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēni uzbūvē frizētavu, lai sapostu vectēvu Grantu, taču gadās misēklis.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbaliba, Barbalala un Barbabella pēc kārtas stāsta stāstu. Katra iekļauj tajā ko ļoti personīgu. Barbapapu ģimene pavada dienu pludmalē. Sadalījušies 2 komandās, barbabērni cīnās par smilšu pussalu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: No kalna izbēdzis āzis izraisa haosu, aprīdams visu, kas pagadās! Bali nekur nav atrodama, un Barbapapa liek lietā savu attapību, meklējot viņu. Viņi pat nenojauš, kāds pārsteigums viņus gaida.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Reksu ģimene dodas ceļojumā cauri galaktikai, lai nokļūtu Raķešpasaulē. Tims un Kaja cīnās par Terijas rezerves biļeti uz Kosmoslendu. Tims, Tija un Tomijs rīko talantu šovu, bet nevar izlemt, kurš uzstāsies pirmais.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda palīdz Riveram uzņemt daudz fotogrāfiju foto konkursam, uzbūvējot ļoti ātru veidu, kā pārvietoties pa Celtnieklīci. Rabls un ķepaiņi palīdz Karlam pagatavot saldējumu visiem. Ja vien Ātrmeistars viņiem netraucēs...

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Ir Draudzības diena! Kad Ātrmeistara dāvana Makrupuča kungam noiet greizi, viņam jālūdz Rabla komandas palīdzība. Rabla komanda palīdz Lūkasam uzbūvēt lieliskāko Zinātnes izstādes vulkānu. Vai Vingsija stāsies izvirduma ceļā?

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Lielais Sarkanais Cālis nejauši sarucina Doru un Zābaciņu, tāpēc Doras brālītim un māsiņai jāpalīdz viņiem atkal kļūt lieliem. Dora glābj draugus no Benija gaisa balona, lai visi varētu doties uz svinībām Karalienes pilī.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims nolemj pierādīt, ka Kajas tētis ir kapteinis Dinostārs. Tims cenšas atpūsties, bet Tijai ir citi plāni. Tims nopērk labākos cepumus pilsētā, bet drīz saprot, ka citiem tos vajag vairāk nekā viņam.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Rabla iemīļotā beisbola zvaigzne netiek mājās, komanda uzbūvē stadionu, lai spēle notiktu turpat Celtnieklīcī. Kucēni gatavi sērfingam! Ja vien tiks pāri karstām smiltīm.
